name: Lambda function URL with no authentication
description: The Lambda function has a Function URL configured with AuthType=NONE, allowing anyone on the internet to invoke it without authentication. This can lead to unauthorized code execution, data exposure, or cost abuse.
remediation: Change the Function URL AuthType to AWS_IAM. If public access is required, implement a custom authorizer in the function code or place an API Gateway with an authorizer in front of the Lambda.
